summary: TrackCenter the second fresh re-image candidate after r01 did not show a clear usable strong-pi ODMR resonance.
scientific_rationale: Human guidance says reject a candidate if strong-pi pODMR does not show a clear usable resonance and move on. The raw/readout-aware review of image145844_reimage_r01 pODMR did not support a clear resonance. The next fresh re-image candidate is rank 2 at [115.833333,118.166667,116.5] um with peak 36.0 kcps and local excess 32.0 kcps. Standalone TrackCenter is required before a pODMR screen.
expected_evidence: track_center_v1 terminal result with final counts and tracked position
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
TrackCenter fails or counts remain collapsed
bridge_action: queue standalone track_center_v1 execute via enqueue_nv_imaging_direct.py
